name: mixpanel_events_after
description: Cohort path analysis: find the most common events users fire AFTER a given trigger event. Answers questions like 'what do users do after UPI addition' or 'top next steps after signup'. Returns a ranked list with event name, distinct user count, and percentage of cohort. Works on every Mixpanel project (uses /export, no JQL dependency).

trigger_event.description: The cohort-defining event, e.g. 'UPI Addition' or 'Signup Complete'. Must match a Mixpanel event name exactly — use mixpanel_list_events first if unsure.

from_date.description: Cohort window start (YYYY-MM-DD). Users who fired the trigger_event in this window become the cohort.

window_hours.description: How far after the trigger to look for subsequent events. Default 168 (7 days).

top_n.description: Maximum number of events to return in the ranked list. Default 20.

exclude_trigger.description: If true (default), exclude the trigger_event itself from the returned ranking — the user just did it.
